data.title: Democratic Senators face backlash for suggesting a 'restricted list' to allow Treasury to flag risky DeFi protocols.
data.description: Democratic senators are being criticized for proposing a counter-plan that would grant the Treasury Department the power to designate high-risk decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols on a list of restricted entities.

Gold stabilized just below $4,000 an ounce, and silver pulled back from four-decade highs as investors booked profits following a sharp rally, part of a broader “debasement trade” where assets like precious metals and Bitcoin attract capital amid concerns over US fiscal deficits

data.title: Stock market rally pauses at record highs. Dow Jones futures rise. Palantir, Netflix, Oracle near buy points.
data.description: After reaching record highs, the stock market rally came to a halt. Several stocks including Palantir, Netflix, and Oracle are poised to be bought with their prices at buy points. Dow Jones Futures saw a rise following the bullish market pause.

data.title: Relativity honors legal industry leaders at 2025 Innovation Awards in Chicago, recognizing individuals and organizations driving progress.
data.description: Recognizing outstanding individuals and organizations for their contributions to advancing the industry, the winners of the 2025 Innovation Awards were revealed by Relativity, a leading global legal technology company, in Chicago on October 9th. The awards ceremony highlighted those who have shown exceptional dedication in driving progress, instigating change, and influencing the future of the sector. This year's recipients exemplified innovation in various aspects, including technology, strategy, and impact. The event showcased a total of [insert number] awardees, underscoring the significance of their work in shaping the industry landscape.

data.title: vivo celebrates 30th anniversary with new documentary "Answer the Call" showcasing user-oriented approach and innovation.
data.description: In Dongguan, China, in October 9, 2025, vivo celebrated its 30th anniversary. A collaboration between vivo and Fortune Magazine led to the production of a documentary titled "Answer the Call" in September 2025. This documentary sheds light on vivo's successful journey by focusing on their user-centric approach, strategic market tactics, and pioneering investments in imaging and AI technologies.

data.title: China Daily report: Meridian Gate of Palace Museum in Beijing, once Forbidden City, opens to public after 5 years.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, it was reported that the Meridian Gate stands tall at the entrance of the Palace Museum in Beijing, formerly China's imperial palace from 1420 to 1911, famously known as the Forbidden City. This historical site hosted a multitude of royals, high officials, and other dignitaries during its centuries of imperial rule.

data.title: SunTx Capital's Suncrete to join NYSE through merger with Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4.
data.description: SunTx Capital Partners, a prominent private equity firm based in Texas, specializing in investments in construction materials, manufacturing, distribution, and services industries, announced a notable collaboration with Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 (NYSE: HYAC) on October 9, 2025. This partnership signifies a strategic move between the two entities with SunTx's expertise and Haymaker's public presence on the New York Stock Exchange. SunTx's investment focus includes a range of sectors, emphasizing its dedication to fostering growth and innovation. Through this collaboration, the partnership aims to enhance their market presence and capitalize on the diverse opportunities available in the industry.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Quantum investors who suffered losses between Nov 15, 2024 and Aug 18, 2025. Contact James Wilson for options.
data.description: Investors who faced losses in Quantum Corporation from November 15, 2024, to August 18, 2025, are urged to reach out to James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP. He is advocating for affected investors to discuss their options directly. If you experienced losses in the mentioned period, it is advised to contact him promptly for further guidance.
Bank of Korea to closely monitor markets

data.title: Velan Inc. reports Q2 results: $67.6M sales, $15.7M profit, $1.7M loss. Backlog at $285.8M, bookings $65.2M. For fiscal 2026.
data.description: Velan Inc., a manufacturer of industrial valves, reported financial results for Q2 2025 with sales at $67.6 million (down from $77.7 million) and net loss at $1.7 million (compared to $1.2 million loss last year). The company's backlog increased to $285.8 million, with bookings at $65.2 million for the quarter. Adjusted EBITDA was $3.4 million, down from $6.7 million last year. For the six-month period, sales were $139.8 million (up from $138.6 million), and net income was $16.2 million (compared to a $3.4 million loss last year). The company has a strong financial position with $29.5 million in cash and total liquidity of approximately $96 million. Velan remains optimistic about its growth prospects in fiscal 2026. The company also declared a dividend of CA$0.10 per common share.
